description: Commencement of 1st Semester 2025/2026 Academic Session
Fresh undergraduate students report for screening and registration
Returning undergraduate students report for registration
Interdenominational service to mark the commencement of 2025/2026 Academic Session
Lectures begin for retuning undergraduate students
Orientation programme begins for all fresh undergraduate students
Late registration with penalty for returning undergraduate students (2 Weeks)
Lectures begin for fresh undergraduate students
Late registration with penalty for fresh undergraduate students (2 Weeks)
Matriculation Ceremony
Christmas/New Year Break (2 Weeks)
Lecture Continues for all undergraduate students
Lectures end for all undergraduate students (13 weeks)
Revision Week (1 Week)
First Semester Examinations begin for retuning undergraduate students (2 Weeks)
First Semester Examinations begin for fresh undergraduate students (2 Weeks)
First Semester Break (2 Weeks)
Marking and Submission of First Semester Examination Scripts
Resumption of Second Semester 2025/2026 Academic Session
Second semester begins for undergraduate students
Registrations begin for all undergraduate students (2 Weeks)
Departmental /Schools Board Meetings
Lectures begin for all undergraduate students
Registrations end for all undergraduate students
Senate Business Committee Meeting (SBC)
Late registration with penalty for all undergraduate students (2 Weeks)
Sports Week
Lectures end for undergraduate students (14 Weeks)
Revision week (1 Week)
Second Semester Examinations begin for returning undergraduate students (2 Weeks)
Second Semester Examinations begin for fresh undergraduate students
Second Semester Break/SIWES PROGRAMMES (9 Weeks)
Marking and Submission of Second Semester Examination Scripts
Departmental/Schools Board Meetings
Senate Business Committee (SBC) Meeting
Commencement of 2026/2027 Academic Session
